metadata.description: Reading-to-anchor dependency mappings for cascade failure detection
metadata.methodology: Each reading specifies which anchors it depends on. If anchor confidence changes, readings must be re-evaluated.

SA-RA\u2082.cascade_note: If Semitic loan layer questioned, demote to SPECULATIVE

PA-I-TO.cascade_note: Primary anchor; if questioned, entire Linear B comparison framework affected

DA-MA-TE.cascade_note: Suggests divine name continuity into Greek period

JA-SA-SA-RA-ME.cascade_note: Interpretation based on positional analysis, not cognate

*411-VS.cascade_note: Provisional dependency mapping for promotion-gate completeness

A-DU.meaning: administrative term under Semitic layer review
A-DU.cascade_note: Dependency trace established for gate completeness; confidence remains constrained by cross-corpus evidence.

SI-RU-TE.meaning: administrative term under Semitic layer review
SI-RU-TE.cascade_note: Dependency trace established for gate completeness; confidence remains constrained by cross-corpus evidence.

I-PI-NA-MA.meaning: administrative/morphological form under Luwian layer review
I-PI-NA-MA.cascade_note: Dependency trace established for gate completeness; confidence remains constrained by cross-corpus evidence.

KA-PA.meaning: contested form; proto-Greek hypothesis currently eliminated
KA-PA.cascade_note: Trace completeness only; threshold-eliminated status blocks promotion.

anchor_me_suffix.meaning: -ME detachable suffix (morphological marker in libation formula; IOZa16 line-break proof)

anchor_si_suffix.meaning: -SI detachable suffix (morphological marker; TLZa1 base form U-NA-KA-NA proves detachability)

cascade_rules.description: Rules for propagating confidence changes through dependencies

rules.action: Reading confidence cannot exceed lowest anchor confidence
All dependent readings flagged for review
All dependent readings demoted to SPECULATIVE minimum
Reading confidence capped at PROBABLE per Principle 4
